Description: A powerful view of worshippers praying outside the Al-Qibli Chapel. I would love to visit Al-Aqsa Mosque because the Israeli occupation has prevented us from visiting it for years.
A stunning view of the Eiffel Tower,i would love to visit this place because it is the global symbol of romance and architectural ingenuity
A group of tourists riding camels in the desert with the pyramids in the background. I would love to visit it because its historic value as an ancient wonder is timeless.
The iconic tower sitting on the Bosphorus strait with boats sailing nearby. I would love to visit it because I see it in Turkish series a lot
A breathtaking view of the Alhambra fortress standing tall amidst a snowy landscape. I would love to visit it because it reminds me of the Islamic history in Al-Andalus
An illuminated night view of the tower with crowds gathered on the lawn. I would like to visit it because it is one of the Wonders of the World
A scenic view of the Great Wall stretching over the mountains with visitors walking along it. I would like to visit it because it is one of the most iconic historical landmarks in the world
A clear daytime view of the Kaaba with worshippers gathered around it. I would like to visit it because it is a deeply significant place in the Islamic religion
A vibrant evening view of Monaco marina glowing with city lights. I would like to visit it because I hear it has many luxurious cars
A lively night scene in Times Square filled with bright neon signs and crowded streets. I would like to visit it because it shows the energetic atmosphere of the city that never sleeps
